title: Banana Porridge
description: Warm oat porridge stirred through with mashed ripe banana and a hint of cinnamon. Naturally sweet and filling.

steps.instruction: Combine oats, milk, cinnamon, and salt in a small saucepan over medium heat.
Cook, stirring frequently, for 8–10 minutes until oats are very soft and thick.
While oats cook, mash banana on a separate plate using a fork until completely smooth.
Remove oats from heat. Stir in mashed banana and honey or sugar if using.
Mix thoroughly so banana is distributed throughout. The mixture should be slightly lumpy but uniform.
If too stiff, add 1–2 tbsp additional warm milk and stir.
Cool to a safe serving temperature. Stir once more before serving.

notes: Very ripe bananas are essential — the browner and more spotted the peel, the sweeter and softer the banana. Milk-based porridge is much creamier than water-based.
